items.title: 🚨NEW: The Sparks suffered another close road loss. As a philosopher once said, close only counts in horseshoes and hand grenades. “We know what we want to feel; we want to feel good basketball with a win at the end,” Nneka Ogwumike said after Sunday’s loss. 🔗 justinrusso.substack
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: 🚨NEW: The Sparks suffered another close road loss. items.title: Dallas Mavericks after trading for Zaccharie Risacher. He's a little more likely to get his $17.4 million team option for 2027-28 picked up with this trade.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Dallas Mavericks after trading for Zaccharie Risacher. He's a little more likely to get his $17.4 million team option for 2027-28 picked up with this trade.

They still have $7 million remaining of their Anthony Davis trade exception.

They're out of second-round picks to trade.

items.title: Atlanta Hawks cap situation after trading Zaccharie Risacher for Lu Dort and Ryan Nembhard.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Atlanta Hawks cap situation after trading Zaccharie Risacher for Lu Dort and Ryan Nembhard.

Dort is currently extension-eligible for up to four years, $95 million over the next six months. He could get more after.

Nembhard will become a restricted free agent after this season.

items.title: Oklahoma City Thunder after trading Lu Dort.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Oklahoma City Thunder after trading Lu Dort.

They save $100 million and have enough second apron space to sign a 15th player without going over.

They will be in the second apron next season once Shai Gilgeous-Alexander's supermax kicks in. Cason Wallace also extension-eligible.
